caption: A screen recording displays a dark-themed computer interface showing server log files. The logs consist of multiple lines of white and light grey text on a black background, documenting HTTP requests with timestamps and IP addresses. Phrases such as "GET /rapidpage HTTP/1.0" and "GET /index.php HTTP/1.0" are visible throughout the logs. In the top right corner, a small profile picture of a man is visible. As the recording progresses, a cursor moves across the screen, and a red rectangular selection box appears, highlighting several lines of the log text. A small pop-up menu appears near the bottom of the screen with the text "u-substr!!!" and "0-back!". The interface includes a top menu bar with the text "Activities", "Documents", and "Oct 28 0021". The view remains centered on the scrolling text logs as the user interacts with the file.
